AUD/USD: RBA seen delivering back‑to‑back hike – BBH
items.summary: Brown Brothers Harriman's (BBH) Elias Haddad reports AUD/USD has broken above 0.7100 with momentum toward 0.7150, as Australian sentiment data leave Reserve Bank of Australia expectations largely unchanged.

items.title: GBP: BoE repricing supports currency near term – Deutsche Bank
items.summary: Deutsche Bank strategists Shreyas Gopal and Sanjay Raja note that UK front-end rates have seen the largest hawkish repricing among G10 central banks, removing earlier dovish expectations for the Bank of England.
